description: Fixed a bug where a prerelease-shaped staging-identity CLI incorrectly resolved Aspire* packages from the shared daily feed instead of the build-specific darc-pub-microsoft-aspire-<commit> feed. This caused aspire add in TypeScript (polyglot) apphosts to offer the wrong package versions. Staging-identity CLIs now always route to their own SHA-specific darc feed regardless of version shape.
name: Fix staging darc feed routing for prerelease-shaped CLI builds
